fill:#FFFFC2; fill-opacity:1.0000; stroke:none;
fill:#FFFFC2; fill-opacity:1.0000; stroke:none;

g.text: - GPIO4-11 form contiguous 8-bit bus for efficient register-level DMA

g.desc: - GPIO4-11 form contiguous 8-bit bus for efficient register-level DMA

g.text: 8-bit 8080 parallel interface (mandatory for SNES emulation speed)

g.desc: 8-bit 8080 parallel interface (mandatory for SNES emulation speed)

g.text: Interface mode: IM2=0 IM1=1 IM0=1 = 8080 8-bit parallel

g.desc: Interface mode: IM2=0 IM1=1 IM0=1 = 8080 8-bit parallel

g.text: - WR strobes data on rising edge, RD directly from GPIO3

g.desc: - WR strobes data on rising edge, RD directly from GPIO3

g.text: - No level shifter: ESP32-S3 GPIO = 3.3V = display logic level

g.desc: - No level shifter: ESP32-S3 GPIO = 3.3V = display logic level
